narrative:
Englewood-I (precinct in Montgomery County) has 717 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.5 percentage points.
